children.title: Sample Request
children.subtitle: Request Samples
children.description: We do not accept sample requests or inquiries from public email addresses. Please use your company or school email address when applying for free samples or product inquiries.

children.title: Cross Reference
children.subtitle: Cross Reference
children.description: Search for equivalent Southchip cross-reference device information, or upload your device list to find datasheets.

children.title: Downloads
children.subtitle: Go to Download Center
children.description: You can find and download the technical documents you need.
